title: Maxet Institute of Technology
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}}
{{Quote|<nowiki />''[…]'' the Maxet Institute of Technology is a vocational school, accredited on its own level of education, but certainly not of the stature of institutes qualified to grant the terminal degrees allegedly in the possession of Rin.|Major Herrit, Imperial communique #46553.27h|<ref name="GG41">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref>}}
The '''Maxet Institute of Technology''' was a vocational school that existed by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The credentials of the [[sentientologist]] [[Obo Rin]] alleged that he had acquired several advanced academic degrees from the institute; however, [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Herrit]] subsequently claimed that the school was not qualified to grant such degrees.

==History==
[[File:Obo_Rin_signature.svg|thumb|right|300px|The credentials of Obo Rin (signature pictured) included several terminal academic degrees from the Maxet Institute of Technology.]]
The Maxet Institute of Technology was a vocational school<ref name="GG41" /> that shared its name with the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Maxet system/Legends|Maxet system]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> It was accredited on its education level, and the credentials of the [[sentientologist]] [[Obo Rin]] indicated he had been granted several terminal academic degrees by the Maxet Institute of Technology.<ref name="GG41" />

At some point during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Herrit]] performed a background check on Rin, whom the Empire had commissioned to [[Author/Legends|author]] a [[Catalog of Intelligent Life in the Galaxy|reference work]] detailing the various [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Herrit subsequently sent [[Imperial Communique 46553.27h|communique #46553.27h]], addressed to<ref name="GG41" /> the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]<ref name="CSWE Vader">{{CSWECite|III|288|Vader, Darth}}</ref> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], in which the major criticized Rin and claimed that the Maxet Institute of Technology was not qualified to grant the degrees it had supposedly conferred upon the researcher. In a [[Imperial Communique 46553.28v|reply communique]], Vader's [[Aide/Legends|aide]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Solistein]] dismissed Herrit's "unsolicited opinions" and, in response to the latter's criticisms of Rin's qualifications, only stated that Vader had not ordered Herrit to perform a background check on the sentientologist.<ref name="GG41" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Maxet Institute of Technology was mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'', a [[1989]] sourcebook authored by [[Troy Denning]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG41" />
